scripts.docker:humr-base:start: docker rm -f humr-base 2>/dev/null; docker run --name humr-base -p 8080:8080 humr-base
scripts.docker:claude-code:build: pnpm docker:humr-base:build && docker build -t humr-claude-code packages/agents/claude-code
scripts.docker:claude-code:start: docker rm -f humr-claude-code 2>/dev/null; docker run --name humr-claude-code -p 3000:3000 humr-claude-code
scripts.docker:codex:build: pnpm docker:humr-base:build && docker build -t humr-codex-agent packages/agents/codex
scripts.docker:google-workspace:build: pnpm docker:humr-base:build && docker build -t humr-google-workspace-agent packages/agents/google-workspace
scripts.docker:google-workspace:start: docker rm -f humr-google-workspace-agent 2>/dev/null; docker run --name humr-google-workspace-agent -p 3001:8080 humr-google-workspace-agent
